settings.subtitle: No Drag. No Tools. No Compromise.

settings.heading: The core of the board
settings.body:
RIIFT tracks integrate seamlessly with your existing shaper and any foil kit. No drag, no compromise. Ride it unpowered, as a perfectly balanced foil-assist, or transform your existing setup into the world's best e-foil.

One board. Every discipline. RIIFT does it all.

settings.heading: One system. Infinite possibilities.
settings.body:
Have RIIFT Tracks engineered into your next board and you've instantly got a full carbon deck-to-baseplate connection like nothing you've ever felt.

Then power up when you're ready: the RIIFT Power System delivers an intuitive assist for uncatchable waves and downwind voyages, or a full e-foil for any flat day.

settings.heading: Three ways to ride. One board.

settings.title: Surf
settings.body: Pure prone foiling with recess-integrated tracks and zero bolt-on drag.

settings.title: Foil assist
settings.body: Perfectly balanced assist for uncatchable waves and long sessions.

settings.title: E-foil
settings.body: Clip in the PowerPack for flat days — no waves, no wind, no excuses.

settings.heading: The RIIFT PowerPack
settings.body: Battery, computer and propulsion in one clip-in unit. Choose your range — every pack shares the same 4P tracks, so you can size up any time.

settings.heading: Perfect balance
settings.body: The centre of mass of the battery sits directly over the centre of lift of the main foil. This is the heart of RIIFT — and what makes it so good to ride.
settings.quote: [ Kane De Wilde quote on the balance goes here ]

settings.title: Drag free
settings.body: Recess-integrated carbon tracks eliminate bolt-on drag.

settings.title: Tool-less
settings.body: Clip-in PowerPack swaps without tools on the water.

settings.title: Balanced
settings.body: Centre of mass over the foil's centre of lift.
